productName: .75g Trichome InTERPreter Pre-Rolls, 6pk - Super Lemon Haze+JJ - 4.5g
description: Ready-to-spark sativa infused pre-roll of Super Lemon Haze, enhanced with concentrate for smoother, slower burning and a serious step up in strength. More potent than flower alone, with more intense effects — with notes of lemon, citrus, and lime, delivering an active, daytime spark. Pace yourself.
